title: helichrysum sivasicum
intro: Helichrysum sivasicum, also known as mountain everlast, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its small yellow flowers and silvery-green leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helichrysum sivasicum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. In terms of herbal preparations, Helichrysum sivasicum is often used in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, allowing for convenient and targeted application of its medicinal properties.
